title: hieracium sommerfeltii subsp. senex
intro: Hieracium sommerfeltii subsp. senex, also known as the Old Man's Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium sommerfeltii subsp. senex are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
